MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Joseph Creitz, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Jack Schlotthauer; No other appearances.

RULING: Plaintiff Jack Schlotthauer's Motion To Compel Discovery And For Sanctions IS GRANTED - respond by July 23, 2008; request for admission are deemed admitted; sanctions are awarded against defendant in the amount of $1,000.00 to be paid within 20 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
